---
title: "Career"
toc: true
---

::: {.section-block}
## Education

**Ph.D. candidate in Electronic Engineering** — Hanyang University, Seoul\
GPA 4.3 / 4.5 · Mar 2024 – present(Apr 2026)\
Semiconductor Nanophotonics Laboratory\
Advisor: Prof. Mun Seok Jeong

**M.S. in Solid-state Physics** — Dongguk University, Seoul\
GPA 4.5 / 4.5 · Sep 2022 – Feb 2024\
Advanced Physics on Electromaterial Laboratory\
Advisor: Prof. Kwun-Bum Chung\
Thesis: *"Performance Control of InSnZnO/InGaZnO Multi-Channel-Layered Transistors with Defect Analysis of Amorphous Oxide Semiconductors"*

**B.S. in Physics** — Dongguk University, Seoul\
GPA 4.2 / 4.5 · Mar 2016 – Aug 2022\
Undergraduate researcher, APEL · Jul 2021 – Aug 2022\
:::

::: {.section-block}
## Research Fellowship

**"Deep-Level Transient Spectroscopy and Nanospectroscopy for Ultrafine Defect Analysis Using Explainable AI in 2D Quantum Semiconductors"**\
Basic Science Research Program, National Research Foundation of Korea (NRF)\
Funded by the Ministry of Education · Sep 2025 – Aug 2027 · 50M KRW
:::

::: {.section-block}
## Skills

| Category | Details |
|:---------|:--------|
| **Spectroscopy** | Raman, Photoluminescence, Ellipsometry, DLTS, Tip-enhanced nanospectroscopy |
| **Machine Learning** | Physics-based data analysis, Deep learning for experimental data, Explainable AI (XAI) |
| **Simulation** | FDTD simulations, Inverse design with adjoint optimization |
| **Others** | Electrical characterization (I-V, etc), XPS, Photolithography, Sputtering |
:::
